holes.name: LeanEval.LinearAlgebra.irreducible_nonnegative_matrix_has_positive_eigenvector_at_spectralRadius
holes.body:
theorem irreducible_nonnegative_matrix_has_positive_eigenvector_at_spectralRadius
    {n : Type*} [Fintype n] [DecidableEq n] [Nonempty n]
    (A : Matrix n n ℝ)
    (hA : A.IsIrreducible) :
    ∃ v : n → ℝ,
      Module.End.HasEigenvector (Matrix.toLin' A) (spectralRadius ℝ A).toReal v ∧
      (∀ i, 0 < v i) := by
  sorry
